updateNote: Day 61 Late PT refresh — Israeli strikes kill 8 in 3 southern Lebanon towns (3 medics killed, 2 Lebanese Army soldiers wounded — first army targeting since ceasefire). IDF orders 16 villages evacuated. GCC 'Decisiveness' summit concludes: shift to 'Maximum Readiness,' collective defense ('attack on one = attack on all'), Gulf Strategic Reserve. Iran Army: 'Do not consider the war over.' Bessent: Iran oil 'creaking,' Kharg Island near max storage, $170M/day loss. Tehran-Moscow flights resume (Mahan Air). Bennett-Lapid form 'Together' party. Netanyahu trial resumes. Hegseth faces Congress Apr 30-May 1. Von der Leyen: 'too early' to remove Iran sanctions. Lebanon death toll: 2,534 killed / 7,863 wounded. Brent $111.12 (+39.2%). WTI $99.32 (+31.5%). AAA gas $4.18. Hormuz Day 58 effectively closed. War Powers May 1 (2 days).
dataFreshnessWarning: Data current as of 11:28 PM PDT April 28, 2026 (Day 61). Next update expected within 6-12 hours.
